code: import{useState}from"react";import axios from"axios";import{API_URL}from"../api";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Login(_ref){let{setUser}=_ref;const[username,setUsername]=useState("");const[password,setPassword]=useState("");const login=async()=>{try{const res=await axios.post("".concat(API_URL,"/login"),{username,password});if(res.data.success){localStorage.setItem("user",res.data.user);setUser(res.data.user);}else{alert(res.data.message);}}catch(err){console.error(err);alert("Login failed");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"login",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Username",onChange:e=>setUsername(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",placeholder:"Password",onChange:e=>setPassword(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:login,children:"Login"})]});}export default Login;
